subject: Mike's race is heading for a runoff. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|

| | **The race for U.S. Senate in Mississippi wasn't decided on Election Day, Peter.** In the Magnolia State, if no candidate gets over 50% of the vote on Election Day, the top two go into a runoff. That's what's happening now. Democrat Mike Espy is heading into a runoff. [**Mike's race is in overtime, and every dollar he can raise will make a huge difference for him. I 'm personally asking: Can you rush Mike a contribution?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd6f/4462dc26/8bae0fb8/201f062f/1452918732/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHl6IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espyz?refcode=sbe1811espyz_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Peter, I know what you might be thinking. Isn't Mississippi a bright red state? Alabama was a bright red state, too -- right up until a Democrat won their U.S. Senate seat last year. These days, we can't rely too heavily on "conventional political wisdom." Polls that came out before the election showed Mike Espy tied in a two-candidate runoff scenario -- exactly where he finds himself now. The bigger question isn't "can he win," it's "will he have the resources to win?" Now that most of the elections are over, the special interests can focus their attention (and their money) on defeating Mike. This runoff will get very expensive, very quickly. [**Let's get Mike the grassroots boost he'll need to win in Mississippi. Chip in $5 or more.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd6f/4462dc26/8bae0fb8/201f062f/1452918732/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMWVzcHl6IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe1811espyz?refcode=sbe1811espyz_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Gratitude for our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Please join me in thanking all who serve our country for everything they have given, and for the freedoms we enjoy thanks to their bravery and sacrifice. | |
---
Folks: On Veterans Day, we keep in mind that our veterans, servicemembers, and military families deserve so much more than just one day of recognition -- but it's a good start. **Please join me in thanking all who serve our country for everything they have given, and for the freedoms we enjoy thanks to their bravery and sacrifice.** I'm very proud to represent the more than 50,000 veterans who live in Ohio's 13th District. A very special thank you from my family to yours. In Congress, I'm committed to making sure our veterans get the health care, economic opportunity, and support they deserve -- both during their service and after they come home. **[Join me this Veterans Day in showing our gratitude to our veterans, servicemembers, and military families. If you're able, please click here to make a donation to the Wounded Warrior Project, a nonprofit dedicated to supporting injured veterans and their families.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9080/5486deaa/240a8fcc/dcf6227/1011089841/VEsH/ "https://support.woundedwarriorproject.org/Default.aspx?tsid=10043")** We may never know the full measure of their devotion, but they should never doubt the full weight of our gratitude. Thank you, \-- Tim

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

Election night was just the beginning.

Results from around the country poured in and races were called, but in Florida and Georgia, there are three important races that are still too close to call.

Republicans, including President Donald Trump, have already begun spreading conspiracy theories and spouting lies about our elections process, even tweeting for an end to the recounts.

That is why we are coming together as Democrats across the country and doing all we can to help make sure that every vote is counted in Florida and Georgia. With your help, Bill Nelson, Andrew Gillum, and Stacey Abrams could still come out on top.

clean_body: Hi there -- In Mississippi, if one candidate does not get over 50% of the vote, the election goes to a run-off. That's exactly what's happening right now, and the race couldn't be tighter - 41%-41%. We have the opportunity to flip one more red seat blue, but Democrat Mike Espy can't win without your support. The election is on November 27th, so there's not much time. That's why I'm asking you personally: "" I won't sugarcoat it. With Democrats losing seats, we could be in for some tough fights around health care, social security, and Supreme Court nominations. We're going to need every last Democratic voice, everyone. When we win tough races like this one, it 's because we fight with everything we've got. Right now, it's time to go all in: "" Thank you for helping. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan "" _

subject: What's next? [Take the Survey]

body:
With the legislative session approaching, it's time to make more progress.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b741/2f5ea88d/7bb521f8/2cbdbd1c/1082027105/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/survey-next-step?utm_source=ema_2018-11-12_pre-freeze-survey&refcode=ema_2018-11-12_pre-freeze-survey&utm_campaign=pre-freeze-survey&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We did it! Last Tuesday, we made huge gains in the Washington state legislature: | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b741/2f5ea88d/7bb521f8/2cbdbd1c/1082027105/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/survey-next-step?utm_source=ema_2018-11-12_pre-freeze-survey&refcode=ema_2018-11-12_pre-freeze-survey&utm_campaign=pre-freeze-survey&utm_medium=ema") **Washington Legislature getting bluer in 2019**
---
This is great news for our progressive movement. Again and again, Washington state is setting an example for the country on important issues like raising the minimum wage, taking action on gun control, creating living-wage jobs, and passing the most generous paid family and sick leave policy in America. We're leading the country in clean energy policy, and Jay Inslee is stepping up to fill the vacuum of climate leadership when Donald Trump won't.
Now that we have secured a larger majority in the state legislature, we're ready to make even greater gains.
**So we want to hear from you. With the legislative session rapidly approaching, let us know: Which issue matters most to you?**

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo, StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Our legal team is on the case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Just yesterday, we filed yet another suit against the Secretary of State's office and a number of counties for actions they are taking to reject absentee and provisional ballots. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa632/34a064cc/5306339/70c20ff/102835601/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - On Friday, we won a major battle and forced Dougherty County election officials to count absentee ballots that were delayed due to a number of factors, including Hurricane Michael. And just yesterday, we filed yet another suit against the Secretary of State's office and a number of counties for actions they are taking to reject absentee and provisional ballots. Some officials have been discounting ballots for incredibly arbitrary reasons despite good faith efforts on the part of eligible voters. These are just a couple examples of the kind of work our team is doing to defend democracy in Georgia. We are going to continue fighting to ensure that every ballot in every single one of Georgia's 159 counties is counted. We will use every resource at our disposal, including filing even more lawsuits if necessary. It won't be easy, and it won't be cheap, but this fight is absolutely worth it. Can we count on your support? **[Chip in $3 to support our team as we fight to defend democracy in Georgia.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa632/34a064cc/5306339/70c20fc/102835601/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTEyMjAxOC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11122018-full")** We are in this until the very end, and we hope to have you fighting beside us. \- Lauren Groh-Wargo

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Damn right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | When you win a big election like we did last week, the press likes to pick apart how you did it. One news outlet said the reason I won was because I've spent my career _"obsessing, first and foremost, over the concerns of workers."_ I have one thing to say about that Peter: **You're damn right.** | | | [ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU'RE WITH ME](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd62/4462dc26/8bc63b3d/201f06bc/2747566782/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181112_m")
---
Too many leaders in Washington don't understand the dignity of work. Our economic policies reward huge companies that ship jobs overseas and leave workers behind, struggling to make ends meet. CEOs rake in huge bonuses after taking away workers' rights to bargain for better working conditions and benefits.
I'm going back to Washington tomorrow to keep fighting for _all_ Americans -- regardless of their zip code, economic status, or color of their skin. **And as we move to implement policies that reward those who make this country work, I need your support.**
[**Add your name to pledge to continue our work, together, in fighting for American workers and their families. >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd62/4462dc26/8bc63b3d/201f06bc/2747566782/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181112_m")
Ohio showed the country that by putting hardworking people first and honoring the dignity of work, we can carry a state Donald Trump won by nearly 10 points.
Thank you for standing with me for the past two years. Now, our work continues. I hope I can count on you to continue fighting for our priorities.
| | [COUNT ME IN](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd62/4462dc26/8bc63b3d/201f06bc/2747566782/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e181112_m")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod
